p.b: This code system defines the following properties for its concepts

tr.td: A string that provides additional detail pertinent to the use or understanding of the concept
The date at which the concept status was last changed
A code that indicates the status of the concept. Typical values are active, experimental, deprecated, and retired

True if the concept is not considered active - e.g. not a valid concept any more. Property type is boolean, default value is false. Note that the status property may also be used to indicate that a concept is inactive

div.p: This case-insensitive code system https://kip.rkkp.dk/fhir/CodeSystem/HarrisHipScorePain defines the following codes:

tr.td: Slight, occasional, no compromise in activity
Slight, occasional, no compromise in activity (40)
Mild pain, no effect on average activities, rarely moderate pain with unusual activity, may take aspirin
Mild pain, no effect on average activities, rarely moderate pain with unusual activity, may take aspirin (30)
Moderate pain, tolerable but makes concessions to pain. Some limitations of ordinary activity or work. May require occasional pain medication stronger than aspirin
Moderate pain, tolerable but makes concessions to pain. Some limitations of ordinary activity or work. May require occasional pain medication stronger than aspirin (20)
Marked pain, serious limitation of activities
Marked pain, serious limitation of activities (10)
Totally disabled, crippled, pain in bed, bedridden
Totally disabled, crippled, pain in bed, bedridden (0)

publisher.value: Sundhedsvæsenets Kvalitetsinstitut with Trifork Digital Health A/S

name.value: Sundhedsvæsenets Kvalitetsinstitut with Trifork Digital Health A/S

description.value: A string that provides additional detail pertinent to the use or understanding of the concept
The date at which the concept status was last changed
A code that indicates the status of the concept. Typical values are active, experimental, deprecated, and retired

True if the concept is not considered active - e.g. not a valid concept any more. Property type is boolean, default value is false. Note that the status property may also be used to indicate that a concept is inactive

display.value: Slight, occasional, no compromise in activity

definition.value: Slight, occasional, no compromise in activity (40)

display.value: Mild pain, no effect on average activities, rarely moderate pain with unusual activity, may take aspirin

definition.value: Mild pain, no effect on average activities, rarely moderate pain with unusual activity, may take aspirin (30)

display.value: Moderate pain, tolerable but makes concessions to pain. Some limitations of ordinary activity or work. May require occasional pain medication stronger than aspirin

definition.value: Moderate pain, tolerable but makes concessions to pain. Some limitations of ordinary activity or work. May require occasional pain medication stronger than aspirin (20)

display.value: Marked pain, serious limitation of activities

definition.value: Marked pain, serious limitation of activities (10)

display.value: Totally disabled, crippled, pain in bed, bedridden

definition.value: Totally disabled, crippled, pain in bed, bedridden (0)
